name: op_get_dom
description: ZOMBIE-OP PROOF (get_dom): `get_dom` was declared with no match arm — it answered `ok` with NO DATA AT ALL, so a caller reading the DOM got nothing back and the test still went green. It now returns the current DOM as a nested tree (index / type / id / classes / text / children) plus the serialized HTML, built by build_dom_response() from the live StyledDom in layout_results. `assert_dom` is evaluated through THAT SAME builder, so these assertions cover the payload the op hands out, not a parallel re-derivation of it. The second half proves the read is LIVE and not a canned/stale answer: after re-mounting a different DOM, the tree must carry the new content and must no longer carry the old.
